demo.title: autoresearch.sh
demo.code:
# Evolve an installed skill (writes the diff)
aeon-autoresearch target=aeon-token-movers

# Score variations without writing anything
aeon-autoresearch target=aeon-token-movers mode=dry-run

setup: Run with a target skill path: `target=<skill-name>`
Use `mode=dry-run` to score without writing the diff
